allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('modern-ui.css','utf8'\);let n=0;let b=0;for\(let i=0;i<c.length;i++\){if\(c[i]==='{'\)n++;else if\(c[i]==='}'\){n--;if\(n<0\){console.log\('unexpected } at pos '+i\);b=1;break;}}if\(n!==0\){console.log\('unmatched braces: '+\(n>0?'missing ':-n+' extra }'\);b=1}else if\(!b\)console.log\('OK - '+c.split\('\\n'\).length+' lines, braces balanced'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('c:/xampp/htdocs/pck/assets/css/modern-ui.css','utf8'\);let n=0;let err=null;for\(let i=0;i<c.length;i++\){if\(c[i]==='{'\)n++;else if\(c[i]==='}'\){n--;if\(n<0\){err='unexpected } at pos '+i;break;}}if\(err\)console.log\(err\);else if\(n!==0\)console.log\('unmatched braces: '+\(n>0?'missing ':-n+' extra }'\)\);else console.log\('OK - '+c.split\('\\n'\).length+' lines'\);")
